widget.errorHint: Click to retry — open settings for fix steps

panel.title: Dictation
panel.emptyHint: Click the mic icon in the bar to start

settings.title: Dictation Settings

bar.title: Bar quick settings
bar.desc: Operational toggles for the mic widget. Speech engine and models are in Plugin settings.

hotkeys.title: Keyboard shortcuts
hotkeys.desc: Dictation does not register global hotkeys itself. Bind the IPC commands below in your compositor (Niri, Hyprland, etc.). The bar mic button always toggles recording.
hotkeys.stopHintDesc: Optional key combo shown in the bar tooltip while dictating (e.g. Super+Shift+D). Leave empty to hide.
hotkeys.genericExampleDesc: Bind this command in your compositor's keybind config:

settings.showOverlayDesc: Compact bubble while dictating (click-through; position in settings)
settings.overlayPositionHintDesc: Enable live overlay above to preview and drag the bubble here. Saved per monitor.
settings.overlayPositionHintActive: Drag the highlighted bubble. It stays visible while these settings are open.
settings.overlayPositionHintActiveMulti: Drag the highlighted bubble. Use Switch monitor to position it on each display.
settings.showPartialDesc: Italic preview text from the streaming pass
settings.showPartialSherpaDesc: Italic preview from sherpa streaming pass
settings.showPartialFwDesc: Italic preview while faster-whisper decodes the current phrase
settings.overlayPositionDesc: Where the transcript card appears on screen
settings.autoTypeDesc: Type each phrase into the focused window via wtype (off = clipboard only on stop)
settings.vadEnabledDesc: Silero VAD skips decode on non-speech audio
settings.vadEnabledSherpaDesc: Silero VAD skips decode on non-speech audio
settings.vadEnabledFwDesc: Skip decode during silence; re-decode on pauses (RMS gate)
settings.vadThresholdDesc: Higher = stricter (less background noise). Restart backend after change.
settings.engineDesc: sherpa-onnx two-pass streaming with Silero VAD noise gating (Zipformer live + Whisper/SenseVoice finals).
settings.engineFwHint: Select faster-whisper above to configure Whisper model size and compute options.
settings.engineFwDesc: faster-whisper (CTranslate2): better for accented English. Re-decodes on pauses; first run downloads the model.
settings.fwModelDesc: small or medium recommended for accented English. Downloads automatically on first use.
settings.fwDeviceDesc: CUDA if available; CPU works with int8 quantization
settings.fwComputeTypeDesc: int8 on CPU; int8_float16 or float16 on GPU. Auto picks a sensible default.
settings.fwAdvancedDesc: Decode quality and pause segmentation. For accented English: set Language to English, try medium model, add an initial prompt. Restart backend after changes.
settings.fwBeamSizeDesc: Wider search (1–10). 5 is default; try 8–10 if words are wrong but latency is OK.
settings.fwTemperatureDesc: 0 = deterministic (recommended). Slightly higher (0.2) can help rare pronunciations.
settings.fwInitialPromptDesc: Optional style hint for Whisper (e.g. Indian English technical vocabulary). Biases spelling and punctuation.
settings.fwConditionOnPreviousTextDesc: Use prior phrases as context. Helps continuity; turn off if text repeats.
settings.fwNoSpeechThresholdDesc: Lower if quiet speech is skipped. Default 0.6.
settings.fwCompressionRatioThresholdDesc: Lower = stricter rejection of repetitive garbage text. Default 2.4.
settings.fwSilenceRmsDesc: Audio below this level is treated as silence. Lower if you speak quietly.
settings.fwPauseSecDesc: Seconds of silence before a phrase is typed. Shorter = faster commits.
settings.fwPartialIntervalSecDesc: How often to refresh the italic preview while speaking.
settings.fwInternalVadDesc: Extra Silero VAD inside faster-whisper decode (separate from mic silence gate). Try if long silences confuse the model.
settings.sherpaAdvancedDesc: VAD gating and phrase-end detection. Restart backend after changes.
settings.sherpaNumThreadsDesc: ONNX Runtime threads (1–8). More can help on multi-core CPUs.
settings.sherpaMinSilenceSecDesc: VAD: silence needed to close a speech segment.
settings.sherpaHangoverSecDesc: Keep gate open briefly after speech stops (preserves word endings).
settings.sherpaEndpointSilence1Desc: Streaming pass: long trailing silence ends a phrase.
settings.sherpaEndpointSilence2Desc: Streaming pass: shorter silence can also end a phrase.
settings.sherpaMaxActivePathsDesc: Zipformer search width (1–8). Higher may improve accuracy at CPU cost.
settings.sherpaProfileDesc: English uses Zipformer+Whisper. Multilingual adds SenseVoice for better non-English accuracy.
settings.sherpaProfileHint: Pick English or Multilingual, then run download_models.sh for that profile.
settings.downloadModelsDesc: Run download_models.sh english (or multilingual) once after install. English ~150 MB; multilingual ~700 MB. Includes Silero VAD (~200 KB).
settings.languageDesc: For non-native English, pick English explicitly instead of Auto-detect — this often improves accuracy with both engines.
settings.timeoutDesc: Optional max seconds (0 = unlimited). Sessions stop via hotkey or mic click.
settings.debugDesc: Backend controls and event log (IPC status, process output)

deps.title: Installation checks
deps.desc: Runs dictation_backend.py diagnose for your saved engine (Apply settings first). Checks Python, packages, models, mic, and wtype.
deps.notRun: Click Verify installation to run checks.
deps.noMain: Plugin not fully loaded — close and reopen settings, or reload the plugin.
deps.fixNeeded: Fix the items above, then verify again

errors.backendTimeout: Backend failed to start (timeout). Open plugin settings → Verify installation.
errors.backendRetries: Backend failed after 3 retries. Open plugin settings → Verify installation.
errors.backendExited: Backend exited unexpectedly. Check plugin settings → Logs, then Verify installation.
